zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wylley II於1515年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾時，他的父親John Wylie19歲，母親Agnes23歲。他於1540年10月30日與Joan Marshall在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1575年10月4日在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wylley II于1515年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾时，他的父亲John Wylie19岁，母亲Agnes23岁。他于1540年10月30日与Joan Marshall在英国英格兰賀特福爾利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1575年10月4日在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾利。

nameMeanings.name: Wylley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire, Cheshire, and Lancashire): variant of   Whaley  .

variants.name: Whaley
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Whalley (Lancashire) or Whaley in Bolsover (Derbyshire). The Lancashire placename may derive from Old English hwæl ‘hill’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Derbyshire placename may derive from Old English wall ‘wall’, walh ‘Welshman, foreigner’ (genitive plural wala), or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wylley II was born in 1515, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wylie, was 19 and his mother, Agnes, was 23. He married Joan Marshall on 30 October 1540, in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 4 October 1575, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wylley II est né en 1515, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wylie, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan Marshall le 30 octobre 1540, à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1575, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Thorley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Oktober 1540 in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1575 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Thorley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Marshall il 30 ottobre 1540, nel Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 ottobre 1575, nel Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wylley IIが1515年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Wylieは19歳，母Agnesは23歳であった。1540年10月30日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーでJoan Marshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1575年10月4日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアソルリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wylley II(이)가 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wylie(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1540년 10월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에서 Joan Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1575년 10월 4일 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 토를리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wylley II nasceu em 1515, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wylie, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Marshall em 30 de outubro de 1540, em Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1575, em Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Thorley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wylley II родился в 1515 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wylie было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Marshall 30 октября 1540 г. в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 4 октября 1575 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности таурли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
